name: Web - Automated Scanner / Recon Tool Detected
description: Detects automated web vulnerability scanners and recon tools by their distinctive User-Agent strings and request patterns. Covers Nikto, sqlmap, Nmap, Metasploit, Acunetix, Burp Suite, and similar tools.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) | eval ua_lower=lower(useragent) | eval scanner_match=case( match(ua_lower, "nikto"), "Nikto", match(ua_lower, "sqlmap"), "sqlmap", match(ua_lower, "nmap"), "Nmap", match(ua_lower, "masscan"), "Masscan", match(ua_lower, "acunetix"), "Acunetix", match(ua_lower, "nessus"), "Nessus", match(ua_lower, "openvas"), "OpenVAS", match(ua_lower, "w3af"), "w3af", match(ua_lower, "burpsuite|burp suite"), "Burp Suite", match(ua_lower, "zgrab"), "ZGrab", match(ua_lower, "dirbuster|gobuster|ffuf|wfuzz"), "Directory Bruteforcer", match(ua_lower, "python-requests|go-http-client|curl/") AND like(uri, "%/.%"), "Generic bot/script", 1==0, null()) | where isnotnull(scanner_match) | stats count as req_count, values(scanner_match) as tools, values(uri) as sample_uris, dc(uri) as unique_uris by src_ip, host | eval severity="medium" | eval mitre="T1595.002" | sort -req_count | table src_ip, host, req_count, unique_uris, tools, sample_uris, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
